calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-08-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Plaintiff ERIKA MCCARTNEY'S Motion For Entry Of Consent Judgment.

There are no appearances in this matter.

There being no appearances, the tentative ruling is adopted: Plaintiff's motion for entry of consent judgment is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements under Health & Safety Code section 25249.7. The Court finds that the warning that is required by the settlement complies with Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5-25249.14; the award of attorney's fees is reasonable under California law; and the penalty amount is reasonable based on the criteria set forth in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7(b)(2). Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order and a separate consent judgment and must email them to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the hearing.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not Reported (302/EPS)
